message:
feat(dashboard): wire xterm.js to terminal WebSocket

Add Alpine.js component 'terminalPanel' that:
- Initializes xterm.js with fit and web-links addons when terminal is shown
- Connects to /ws/terminal/{taskID} WebSocket endpoint
- Sends terminal_input messages with user keystrokes
- Receives terminal_output messages and writes to terminal
- Handles terminal resize with terminal_resize messages
- Shows connection status (connected, connecting, error states)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
